brand.name: FolkaDrive
brand.tagline: Cars you can trust, whenever you need them

hero.title: Drive yourself, or let our driver take the wheel
hero.subtitle: A premium fleet in Jakarta, Bandung, and Bali. Book in two minutes. Transparent pricing, no hidden fees.

categories.title: Pick a category
categories.subtitle: Five fleet types for every kind of trip.
categories.suvDesc: Tall and rugged for varied terrain and long trips.
categories.citycarDesc: Agile and efficient for city traffic.
categories.evDesc: Modern, emission-free mobility with charging available.

howItWorks.title: Three steps, ready to drive
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick location, dates, and mode. The price you see is the price you pay.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Upload ID and license, pay via QRIS, e-wallet, card, or Virtual Account.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Collect the car, document condition, and start your journey.

items.transparencyDesc: Total rental + deposit + add-ons shown before payment. No surprises.
items.verificationDesc: Upload ID and license; we verify within 15 minutes during business hours.
items.driversDesc: Every driver has 3+ years of experience, vetted and in uniform.
items.fleetDesc: Routine inspection, photo-documented handover, quick deposit refund.

cta.title: Ready to hit the road?
cta.subtitle: Book now. Our team confirms within 15 minutes.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What is the minimum rental duration?
faq.a1: Minimum 1 day (24 hours) for self-drive, 8 hours for with-driver.
faq.a2: Yes. IDR 50,000/hour for self-drive and IDR 75,000/hour for with-driver after hour 9.
faq.a3: Free cancellation up to 2 days before. Tiered fees apply afterwards. See terms for details.
faq.a4: Deposit is held at pickup and refunded in full within 24 hours after the car is checked.
faq.a5: Yes. Self-drive requires an International Driving Permit plus passport. With-driver requires only a passport.

footer.tagline: Cars you can trust, whenever you need them.

carDetail.term1: Self-drive requires a valid license held for 2+ years.
carDetail.term2: With-driver: 12-hour shift, overtime per rate sheet.
carDetail.term3: Fuel, tolls, and parking are outside the rate (with driver).
carDetail.term4: Free cancellation 2 days before, see full policy.

checkout.agreeTerms: I agree to the rental terms and deposit policy.
checkout.doneSubtitle: Check email and WhatsApp for details. Receipt is available in your account.

login.title: Sign in to FolkaDrive
login.subtitle: Enter your phone number, we will send an OTP.
